name: Holiday Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Have all ingredients at 60 degrees Fahrenheit for easier mixing.
2. Combine all ingredients except nuts in a large bowl.
3. Form the mixture into a ball or log.
4. Chill before forming into shape if needed.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Serve with crackers, raw vegetables, or fresh fruit. These also make lovely holiday gifts. You can color the coating by adding mild paprika or chopped parsley with the nuts.
